creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
This vt newcons bug is old, help-seeking users regularly complain about it on the FreeBSD forums, and I just don't understand why the bug still is there.

When used in graphics mode, switching from xorg to vt newcons results in a display of colored boxes.

When used in text mode (hw.vga.textmode=1), vt newcons is usable when switching to console. But, after exiting xorg, vt newcons fails until user switches between consoles using ALT-Fn, which makes vt newcons work again.
